title: pinalia ochracea
intro: Pinalia ochracea, also known as the golden orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in Southeast Asian countries, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Pinalia ochracea are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain and inflammation, and support respiratory health. In herbal preparations, Pinalia ochracea is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its safety and efficacy.
